name: Baileys Irish Cream Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate, Baileys, and heavy cream together over very low heat.
2. Whisk in the egg yolks one at a time; the mixture will thicken.
3. Whisk in the butter until smooth.
4. Refrigerate overnight or until firm.
5. Using a spoon, form small balls.
6. Roll each ball in powdered sugar, cocoa powder, chopped nuts, sprinkles, etc.
